new.name: CVE-2026-55993
new.description: PoC reproducer for CVE-2026-55993 (Apache Camel camel-atmosphere-websocket): the WebSocket consumer copies connection query parameters onto the Exchange unfiltered, so an injected CamelHttpUri drives a server-side request (SSRF) and leaks resolved property placeholders. Fixed in 4.14.8/4.18.3/4.21.0.

new.name: CVE-2026-45729
new.description: ThorVG NULL pointer dereference via malformed SVG — AFL++ fuzzing writeup

new.name: CVE-2026-56139
new.description: PoC reproducer for CVE-2026-56139 (Apache Camel camel-undertow Rest DSL): the Rest DSL binding hard-codes muteException=false, so a configured muteException=true is ignored and an uncaught exception's full stack trace is returned to the client (CWE-209). Fixed in 4.14.8/4.18.3/4.21.0.

new.name: CVE-2026-55994
new.description: PoC reproducer for CVE-2026-55994 (Apache Camel camel-iggy): the consumer copies an Iggy message's user-headers onto the Exchange unfiltered, so an injected CamelHttpUri drives a server-side request (SSRF) and leaks resolved property placeholders. Fixed in 4.18.3/4.21.0.

new.name: Bedside.htb_solved
new.description: Writeup educativo de la máquina Bedside (Medium) de Hack The Box.  Cubre: reconocimiento, explotación de deserialización insegura en  pdfminer.six (CVE-2025-64512), path traversal en Vite dev server,  y escalada de privilegios mediante abuso de torch.load()/pickle.  Fines educativos únicamente.

update.name: YellowKey-Bitlocker-CVE-2026-45585
update.description: YellowKey BitLocker CVE-2026-45585 is an open-source utility to extract, backup, and organize BitLocker recovery keys on Windows encrypted drives.
